title: thelypteris deflexa
intro: Thelypteris deflexa, also known as the flexible fern, is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae, native to tropical Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional Chinese medicine, where it is believed to possess anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Thelypteris deflexa include its ability to reduce fever, relieve pain, and promote wound healing. In herbal preparations, Thelypteris deflexa is often used to make infusions, decoctions, and poultices, which can be applied topically or ingested to harness its medicinal properties.
